summary: Theron-Legal contract review with clause-level risk annotation
description: Performs a structured legal review of a contract document using Theron-Legal, the 100B+ legal specialist. Identifies high-risk clauses, one-sided provisions, missing standard protections (IP assignment, limitation of liability, indemnification, governing law), and jurisdiction-specific compliance issues. Returns clause-level annotations with risk scores and suggested redline language. Not a substitute for licensed legal counsel — output is advisory.
